title: List of Nicotine Replacement Therapy dosage forms that may be accessible for self-selection by purchasers or consumers - Canada.ca
content:
## List of Nicotine Replacement Therapy dosage forms that may be accessible for self-selection by purchasers or consumers
This list is incorporated by reference in the Supplementary Rules Respecting Nicotine Replacement Therapies Order (Order). This list is relevant for the purposes of the following provisions of the Order: subsection 7(1) and sections 8, 11, 12, 20, 22 and 23. The dosage forms set out in this list are as described in the controlled vocabulary of the Natural Health Products Ingredients Database. Health Canada maintains and updates this list as required.
Effective date: 2024-08-28

## Dosage Forms for Administration in the Oral Cavity
- Spray (metered dose)
Guidance on Additions to the List of Nicotine Replacement Therapy Dosage Forms
